rollback_boundary: Single-commit `git revert <impl-sha>` restores the C-4 closure state (merge 9a6a550) byte-for-byte for production source. Revert removes dossier/export.py, dossier/import_.py, dossier/comparison.py, the __init__.py exports for those names, the two LLM tool definitions + dispatch entries, the chat meta-command extension, the cmd2 do_dossier handler, the five new test files, the test_agent_tools.py count updates, and the M-9 evidence directory. Library files at ~/.ap/dossier_library/<actor_identifier>.json are OUTSIDE the repo and persist on disk through revert (manual cleanup if desired). Tool count after revert: 28 (C-4 baseline restored). No workspace schema change, no database migration, no event-bus subscriber, no event-action.
acceptance_notes: Phase 17M closeout (C-4 merge 9a6a550 / impl 0d1f227) is M-9's responsibility per dispatch context. The MASTER_PLAN.md Phase 17M row and the Plan Status table row for W-30-C4-COLUMBO both flip from in-progress to completed with SHAs in the SAME implementer commit as source (AP #74 orphan-prevention). Active Phase Pointer line re-pointed from W-30-C4-COLUMBO to W-68-M9-CROWDSOURCED-DOSSIERS. Tool count contract: post-M-9 floor is 30. Existing test_agent_tools.py assertions at lines 183, 287, 1422 (each currently `len(...) == 28`) update to `== 30`. The library directory `~/.ap/dossier_library/` is created on first `publish_to_library` call with 0o700 permissions; the env var `AP_DOSSIER_PUBLISH=on` is the consent gate. The `AP_DOSSIER_LIBRARY` env var is the path-override knob for tests and power users. Bundle metadata field `x_ap_actor_identifier` MUST round-trip equal to the export-time argument, so import-side identification matches export-side intent. The five test files total ~74 new tests; the existing test_agent_tools.py extension adds 2 assertions and updates 3 count sites. Implementer commit message: `feat(dossier-m9): crowdsourced dossier export/import/comparison + public actor library` with body referencing #68, DEC-M9-* range, and v0.3.x dossier roadmap closure for the crowdsourcing axis.
ready_for_guardian_definition: All required_tests are green (every entry passes when executed verbatim against implementer HEAD SHA). Full test suite green via `pytest tests/ -q` (zero failures; total count >= C-4 baseline + ~74 new M-9 tests; reviewer pastes exact count). Every git-diff entry in required_evidence captured verbatim — 'MUST be empty' diffs confirmed empty (paste each); modes.py + dossier/* (non-new) + gamification/* + workspace.py + database.py + stix.py + runner.py + pyproject.toml diffs all empty. Every real-path check captured with actual output. Every authority invariant verified by its named test (or by architectural disconnection where named). Every integration point has named edit verified by diff. No forbidden shortcut taken. tmp/evidence-m9-crowdsourced-comparison/ contains Stage A through F captures. tool count audit equals 30; both new tool names present. _DOSSIER_ACTIONS unchanged at 4-tuple. Library dir permissions 0o700 after first publish (named test in test_dossier_library.py + stat capture). MASTER_PLAN.md edited in SAME commit as source: Phase 17N appended with binding decisions and Decision Log (DEC-M9-*); Phase 17M row flipped to completed with C-4 SHAs (merge 9a6a550 / impl 0d1f227); Plan Status table row for W-68-M9-CROWDSOURCED-DOSSIERS added; Plan Status table row for W-30-C4-COLUMBO flipped to completed with SHAs; Aggregate paragraph updated to reflect M-9 landing; Active Phase Pointer re-pointed to W-68-M9-CROWDSOURCED-DOSSIERS. Implementer commit message follows `feat(dossier-m9):` prefix and references #68 + DEC-M9-* range. tmp/m9-scope.json registered into runtime via `cc-policy workflow scope-sync` before implementer dispatch and unchanged at landing time. Reviewer emits `REVIEW_VERDICT=ready_for_guardian` at implementer head SHA after all the above are confirmed.
